summary: CONSTITUTIONAL CHECKS: ALL 4 PASS — Cantonal satisfied (no new tables, functions/triggers on existing LCS tables, all within lcs schema), Registry-First (N/A — no tables created), Sovereign ID (no minting, enforcement-only triggers), No sideways calls (all operations within lcs schema). ENVELOPE: PASS — all 4 fields match against T0830 refined WP (change_type=fix, architectural_flag=false, doctrine_version=2.8.0). SCOPE: PASS — 2 modified paths within migrations/ and tests/. No protected assets touched. EXECUTION: PASS — all 6 T0830 acceptance criteria met. Part 1 Emission FSM: fn_validate_emission_transition enforces STAGED→{PROMOTED,REJECTED,ERROR} only, all three terminal, same-status allowed, RAISE EXCEPTION on illegal. BEFORE UPDATE trigger trg_emission_status_fsm with WHEN (OLD.status IS DISTINCT FROM NEW.status) for performance. Part 2 CID Immutability: v0 triggers verified intact via runtime DO block (trg_cid_intake_no_update blocks after ACCEPTED, trg_cid_intake_no_delete blocks all DELETE). Full UPDATE block would break fn_process_cid PENDING→ACCEPTED — v0 pattern is correct. Part 3 Canonical Monotonic: fn_canonical_monotonic_guard blocks lifecycle regression (ordinal 1-6), SID rewind (once set, immutable), MID/last_cid null regression, dispatch regression within same MID (resets on MID change = new cycle). Dispatch ordinal ties (DELIVERED/BOUNCED/FAILED = 4) are correct — alternative terminal outcomes. 15 enforcement tests across 3 parts: Part 1 (7 tests — 3 legal + 4 illegal transitions), Part 2 (2 tests — UPDATE/DELETE blocked), Part 3 (6 tests — lifecycle/SID/MID/last_cid/dispatch regression + forward allowed). ALSO-SATISFIES T0820: All 6 criteria met. CID 'block all UPDATE' adapted to 'block after ACCEPTED' — documented. OBSERVATIONS: (1) Trigger ordering correct: trg_emission_guard (SRC4) fires before trg_emission_status_fsm (Phase 2E) — alphabetical. (2) Canonical trigger ordering: trg_lcs_canonical_guard (v0 session-var) fires before trg_lcs_canonical_monotonic (Phase 2E). (3) ERROR added as terminal state beyond T0820 scope — correct for fn_promote_emission error path. (4) CID immutability verified not created — no redundant triggers. (5) Canonical tests use SET LOCAL lcs.allow_canonical_write to bypass session-var guard.
